name: Wind-Up Carrier Zenmaity
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>発</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぜん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>条</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>空</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>くう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>母</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ゼンマイティ
desc:
2 Level 3 monsters
Once per turn: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card; Special Summon 1 "Wind-Up" monster from your hand or Deck. When a face-up "Wind-Up" monster on the field is destroyed and sent to your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card to target that monster; return that target to the hand.
